Class NumberCard

java.lang.Object
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.universal_base.card.CardBase
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card.Card
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card.NumberCard
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<CardBase>
public final class NumberCard extends Card
Representation of a playing card with a color and value

The color and value are immutable.

Note: we will override all superclass methods that our game uses which return a CardBase reference to reduce/eliminate the need to cast to Card, particularly for fluent methods

Version:
1.0 2025-11-11 Initial implementation based upon standard_cards.card.Card
Author:
Dave Rosenberg

      theValue - this card's face value

      create a temporary clone of a card, typically for searching
